creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
Hello. Trying to build net-mgmt/prometheus2 and building relative to 2021Q4 (but there haven't been changes since according to the github ports site) 

My issue is this:

===>  Giving up on fetching files:  containerd-containerd-v1.5.4_GH0.tar.gz 
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/net-mgmt/prometheus2/distinfo)
are up to date.  

Well it seems sysutils/containerd has this:

SHA256 (containerd-containerd-v1.5.5_GH0.tar.gz) = 7a04c284066882152e4968c4997b7a0b1c85c0ba549dad66f3911864163646dd
SIZE (containerd-containerd-v1.5.5_GH0.tar.gz) = 7711631

but net-mgmt/prometheus2 has this:

SHA256 (containerd-containerd-v1.5.4_GH0.tar.gz) = 44ed4a11f1e286addfc079464977835fe0e391ae1947bfaaeb38fd6c366b5ad4
SIZE (containerd-containerd-v1.5.4_GH0.tar.gz) = 7675134

Does this need to be updated?
